research_question: Among adults (18+ years) diagnosed with borderline personality disorder, do specialized evidence-based psychotherapies (dialectical behaviour therapy, mentalisation-based therapy, transference-focused therapy, schema therapy, or STEPPS) improve core BPD symptoms, self-harm, service use, and quality of life compared with treatment-as-usual, wait-list, or other structured psychotherapies?
